title: Xemas PVP
description: Xemas PVP, is an modpack optimized for PVP and gameplay.
body:
![Xemas PVP Banner](https://d6k9.site/cdn/xemas-banner.png)

> ## Disclaimer!
> This project has been discontinued, and a new version similar to this one will be soon released!

## 🚀 Xemas PVP
- Modpack on Fabric for version (1.21.1)

**Xemas PVP** is a **lightweight, pvp-first modpack** custom-built for **competitive Minecraft PvP** on **1.21.1 (Fabric)**. I've hand-picked and custom-configured every mod to drastically improve fighting, movement, and game experience.

* **Made by:** d6k9
* **Newest Version:** Beta v1.0.100
* **Hosted on:** [d6k9.me](https://d6k9.me)

---

### ⚔️ Combat, Core Components and utilities 📊

| Mod/Feature | Description |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Crystal Optimizer** | **Marlow's Crystal Optimizer** |
| **InventoryHud+** | Armor durability and Items (in-hand / off-hand) durability HUD. |
| **EffectTimer** | Potion countdowns to stay focused mid-fight. |
| **Font** | Small capitalized letters for better readability and better looking texts. |
| **Jade** | Shows all entities including players health, armor bar, and description. |
| **Appleskin** | Shows saturation, which can help improve regeneration mid-fight. |
| **PVP Essentials [TexturePack]** | Smaller visuals for items such as **Totems**, **Shields**, and other bulky items. |
| **BetterHurtCam** | Disables the hurtcam shake, which can be annoying when fighting. |
| **BetterMovement** | Fixes movement issues, like being unable to go backward while holding W. |
| **Centered Crosshair** | Fixes your uncentered crosshair [this wasn't your aim it was the cursor]. |
| **Camera Tweaks** | Adds cool camera features: **fullbright**, **freecam**, **freelook**, and more. |
| **Crosshair Indicator** | Shows when you are able to hit your opponent. |
| **Marlow's Crystal Optimizer** | Optimizes packets between the server and client for improved crystaling. |
| **Shulker Box Tooltip** | Shows all items from inside the Shulkerbox for faster navigation. |
| **Remove Reloading Screen** | Removes the loading screen, so you can change your texture pack mid-fight without worrying. |
| **Optimization/Libraries** | Rest of the mods are for general optimization, game enhancement, and libraries. |

---

### 📋 Changelog Highlights

**Beta v1.0.100 — 1.21.1:** First beta release!
